How it works

Simple. Clear. No games.

Step 01
Browse

Look through real people at your own pace, with no swiping frenzy and no pressure.

Step 02
Say Hello

See someone you like? Click Hello and let them know you're interested.

Step 03
Start chatting

If they say Hello back, you can chat. Straightforward, mutual, and simple.

Step 04
Or simply move on

Not feeling it? Just say Goodbye and carry on browsing - no awkwardness, no pressure.

More than matching

Member offers and added value.

Next Hello is more than just a place to meet someone. It's designed to feel welcoming, useful and genuine - with a growing community, local events, and exclusive offers for over 50s.

Join before June and receive 12 months free, along with VIP Founding Member status - recognising you as one of the very first to be part of something new.

Built from experience - not theory

A founder who understands the problem.

I'm 67, single for the past 7 years - and I built Next Hello because I was tired of what dating apps had become.

Too much swiping.
Too many hidden costs.
Too little honesty.
Not worth my time.

So I created something simpler. Something calmer. Something more human.
No hidden fees. No hidden profiles. Just real people.

A place where one genuine connection means more than a hundred empty matches.

Ready to start something real?

Start with Hello.

A calmer, simpler way to meet real people over 50.
